summary: Add RSS-native latest, search, read, links, categories, and authors commands on top of the generated /feed wrapper.
reason: The v4.2.1 generator correctly emits a feed wrapper from the OpenAPI spec, but Marginal Revolution's command-line-safe surface is RSS/XML, and agents need parsed post-level workflows rather than raw XML.
validated_outcome: go test, go vet, build, verify-skill, and live RSS smoke tests pass.
